name: python3-smb
title: python3-smb
description:
SMB/CIFS library (Python 3)
This package contains an experimental SMB/CIFS library written in Python. It
implements the client-side SMB/CIFS protocol which allows your Python
application to access and transfer files to/from SMB/CIFS shared folders like
your Windows file sharing and Samba folders.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-smb because SMB/CIFS library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-smb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-smb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-smb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
